violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the refrigerated tables were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Hand washing sink was found dirty during inspection. Hand washing sink should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor throughout the kitchen was found dirty, especially under equipment. Floor should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Pop dispenser at the drive-up window was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire shelving units in the walk-in cooler were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean lids were found stored in a dirty container in the storage area. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single-use paper cups used for ketchup were found stored in a dirty container. Single-use items should be stored in a clean location.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
